title: SharedEnvelope
description: Canonical shared envelope for all admitted Forge proving-slice artifact families.

artifact_id.description: Stable UUID for this artifact instance.

artifact_version.description: Monotonic integer version of the family schema.

produced_by_system.description: Repo or system identity of the producer.

produced_by_component.description: Component or module within the producing system.

source_scope.description: Scope at which this artifact was originally observed.

lineage_root_id.description: UUID of the root artifact in this lineage chain. Equal to artifact_id for root artifacts.

parent_artifact_id.description: UUID of the direct parent artifact. Null for root artifacts.

trace_id.description: Distributed trace identifier spanning the producing operation.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the artifact was created by the producer.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the artifact was durably recorded.

sensitivity_class.description: Sensitivity classification governing visibility and promotion eligibility.

promotion_class.description: Whether this artifact may be promoted to shared truth.

validation_status.description: Validation outcome at time of recording.

signer_identity.description: Identity string of the signing party.

signature.description: Opaque signature over the canonical payload body.

payload.description: Family-specific payload. Validated against the admitted family schema.
